methodology: Cross-referenced 6 major 'Artists to Watch 2026' lists. Artists appearing on 2+ lists = highest breakout probability.

multiListArtists.name: fakemink
multiListArtists.note: Frank Ocean cosign, Gucci runway, Coachella 2026. Already on BB VIP watchlist at $184 uniform pricing. Dante's Inferno-inspired album 'Terrified'. Pitchfork called him 'UK underground crown prince'.
multiListArtists.signal: 🔴 RED — triple-listed + already confirmed secondary pricing

multiListArtists.name: After
multiListArtists.note: Y2K-era sparkle aesthetic. Triple-listed across all major publications.

multiListArtists.name: Fcukers
multiListArtists.note: NYC duo, Governor's Ball, debut album Ö. Spotify Essential track: 'Bon Bon'.
multiListArtists.signal: 🟡 WARM — double-listed but very small venues (300-600 cap)

multiListArtists.name: Moliy
multiListArtists.signal: 🟡 WARM — Afrobeats touring market is growing

multiListArtists.name: JayDon
multiListArtists.note: Signed to Usher's Gamma label. Childish Gambino collab. Lion King actor.
multiListArtists.signal: 🟡 WARM — major label backing + famous collaborators

multiListArtists.name: Karri
multiListArtists.note: Signed to Drake's PFL label. '3AM in Oakland' viral. Kehlani feature.

multiListArtists.name: Gabriel Jacoby
multiListArtists.note: Toured with Khamari. Debut EP 'gutta child'.

multiListArtists.name: Hearts2Hearts

multiListArtists.name: Lambrini Girls
multiListArtists.note: Brighton UK punks. VS ID: 183803. Coachella 2026. First NA headline tour. Paradise Rock Club Boston.

singleListHighPotential.name: Qveen Herby
